chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 5409 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For Orders on CMA No.23050/2025. (U/A) 2. For Orders on CMA No.22738/25 (Exp) 3. For Orders on CMA No.22739/25 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Mr. Imran Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Dileep Kumar B. Manglani, advocate for applicant. 1. Granted. 2to4. On the last date, petitioner was absent without any intimation and justification. Even today, brief is being held for no cogent reason whatsoever. Matter is being listed time and time again at the behest of the petitioner, however, on each occasion, the petitioner remained unrepresented, therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
